name: James Thurber
abstract: James Grover Thurber (December 8, 1894 – November 2, 1961) was an American cartoonist, writer, humorist, journalist, and playwright. He was born in Columbus, Ohio, and attended Ohio State University (OSU), leaving in 1918 without graduating.

works_created.t: If Grant Had Been Drinking at Appomattox

about_quotes.speaker: Bill Crow
about_quotes.evidence: I fell in love with James Thurber and E.B. White and Alexander Wolcott... that was my beginning of my appreciation of really good writing.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bill Crow interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, October 18, 1995
